segments.scene_description: A perfectly static view of a gothic study hall or common room with vaulted ceilings and magical runes on the walls. Warm light from two wall sconces illuminates the stone interior and wooden furniture, while the camera maintains an elevated fixed position throughout the entire segment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a perfectly static perspective of a dimly lit gothic study hall that remains unchanging in its atmospheric stillness. It begins with an elevated view of the stone interior, where vaulted ceilings and magical runes define the architectural space. As the camera holds its fixed position, the warm glow from two wall sconces continues to illuminate the surrounding wooden furniture and cold masonry. The scene remains frozen in this singular composition, preserving the quiet, scholarly mood of the common room without any shift in lighting or movement.
